creator: scheidell@FreeBSD.org
text:
Chris's patch attached here for audit:
Works as expected.

Tested in tinderbox.
withportexamples:
http://lorie.secnap.net/tb/logs/7-scheidell_I386/gnutls-2.12.18.log
with NOPORTEXAMPLES:
http://lorie.secnap.net/tb/logs/7-SECNAP_I386-nox11/gnutls-2.12.18.log

Again, no portrevision bump since this won't change package for default.

thanks Chris.. learning every day.

-- 
Michael Scheidell, CTO
SECNAP Network Security Corporation
http://people.freebsd.org/~scheidell
